tool.title: Tool
tool.description: Which operation to run: search opportunities, get one by id, or list recent changes.

keyword.title: Keyword
keyword.description: Keyword to match in the solicitation title or category.

due_after.title: Due after (YYYY-MM-DD)
due_after.description: Only solicitations with a due date on/after this date.

due_before.title: Due before (YYYY-MM-DD)
due_before.description: Only solicitations with a due date on/before this date.

solicitation_id.title: Solicitation ID
solicitation_id.description: Bid number to fetch (used by get_opportunity).

since.title: Changes since (ISO-8601)
since.description: For list_recent_changes: only changes at/after this timestamp.

limit.title: Max results
limit.description: Maximum number of records to return.
